summary: V1.1.11 Evolution Lab Refraction Engine & CosmicErrorBoundary Testing - ALL PASS. Frontend-only testing completed. Evolution Lab 3D Refraction Engine (R3F Canvas) mounts correctly with WebGL context, auto-selection works, specimen card selection changes 3D gem, Polish/Refine/Awaken interactions work with reaction line feedback (no toast spam), CosmicErrorBoundary has no 'Show details' button (yellow chrome removed), /forgotten-languages loads without crash.
critical_code_review_comments: EvolutionGemStage3D.jsx correctly implements procedural PHI gem rendering with R3F Canvas
EvolutionLab.js correctly imports and mounts EvolutionGemStage3D with auto-selection (line ~400-460)
handleInteract correctly sets reactionLine instead of toast for success path (line ~340-365)
CosmicErrorBoundary.js simplified to inline glyph line with 'tap to refold' - no yellow buttons
SovereignMath.js exports PHI/PHI_INV constants used by gem stage for idle bob frequency
seed_data_creation: None - used existing specimen collection (moonstone, pearl, lapis lazuli)
context_for_next_testing_agent: V1.1.11 Evolution Lab Refraction Engine testing complete. All features verified: (1) 3D Canvas mounts with data-testid='evo-refraction-engine' and 'evo-gem-stage-3d', (2) Canvas has WebGL context (1846x218 dimensions), (3) Auto-selection shows first specimen on load, (4) Clicking different specimen cards changes the 3D gem and inline label, (5) Polish button triggers /api/evolution/interact and shows reaction line (no toast), (6) CosmicErrorBoundary has no 'Show details' toggle, (7) /forgotten-languages loads without crash. Test account has 3 specimens: Moonstone (uncommon), Pearl (uncommon), Lapis Lazuli (rare).

features_verified.auto_selection_on_load: PASS - 3D gem visible immediately, first specimen selected
features_verified.specimen_card_selection: PASS - Clicking different card changes gem and inline label
features_verified.polish_refine_awaken_interaction: PASS - Button click triggers API, reaction line appears
features_verified.no_toast_on_success: PASS - No sonner toast for evolve interactions
features_verified.reaction_line_display: PASS - data-testid='evo-reaction-line' shows XP and mantra
